name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Oklahoma City, OK's Western Union Money Order Only at 1100 N Meridian Ave offers convenient money order services seven days a week.
description_long:
Western Union Money Order Only at 1100 N Meridian Ave in Oklahoma City serves residents seeking reliable money transfer and money order services. Located in a convenient standalone location, this service center operates seven days a week from 7AM to 9PM, making it accessible for morning and evening errands across Oklahoma City.

This Oklahoma City location specializes in money order services and related financial transactions. Staff can assist with money order processing, and you can reach them at +1 405-900-3830 to confirm availability or ask about specific transaction details. The straightforward service model means you'll get quick processing without unnecessary complexity.

If you're in Oklahoma City, OK looking to send money orders or need financial services at convenient hours, Western Union Money Order Only provides a reliable option. Bring a valid government-issued ID and your payment method when you visit 1100 N Meridian Ave. This location is ideal for quick transactions during extended daily hours.
address: 1100 N Meridian Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73107

company_info.headquarters: 1100 N Meridian Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73107

pros: 24/7 online money transfer initiation available through their website
Extensive agent network across the US through partnerships with major retailers (Walmart, Safeway, City Market, Circle K)
Multilingual support in six languages including Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese
Money order-only service available at select locations for customers who prefer that specific payment method
Online price estimation tool allows customers to see fees before completing transactions
Western Union Rewards program provides incentives for frequent users
Multiple service options beyond money orders including bill payment, mobile top-ups, and inmate payments
cons: Fee structure is not transparent on the website; customers must use separate price estimation tool to see actual costs
Service depends on third-party retail locations with limited hours (most close by 8-11 PM), reducing accessibility for night-shift workers
Does not offer traditional banking services like checking accounts, savings accounts, or credit products
Geographic coverage varies; location availability shown in search results was limited to Colorado region in sample data
Technical issues noted on website (Orange wallet temporarily unavailable) suggest service reliability concerns
best_for: Immigrants and international customers sending money to family overseas
Unbanked or underbanked consumers without traditional bank accounts who need cash-based financial services
Individuals requiring money orders for bill payments, rent, or other financial obligations
Customers in rural or underserved areas where traditional bank branches are unavailable but retail partners exist
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers—particularly immigrants—who need to send or receive money through a widely accessible retail network without requiring traditional bank accounts. The primary caveat is that fees are not displayed upfront on their location pages, and service quality depends on third-party retail partners with limited evening and weekend hours, making it less convenient than dedicated financial institutions for time-sensitive needs.
services: Domestic money transfers (send money within the US)
Cash pickup services (receive funds at agent locations)
meta_description: Western Union Money Order Only at 1100 N Meridian Ave, Oklahoma City, OK. Fast money order services 7AM–9PM daily.
